summary: Comprehensive testing of FLOWTYM Housekeeping V2 module. All 4 main views (Réception V2, Direction V2, Gouvernante V2, Mobile Femme de chambre V2) working correctly with NestJS API. Valider/Refuser inspection buttons functional with proper dialogs. All 16 backend tests passed.

minor.issue: Returns 500 due to Pydantic validation error - missing fields in RoomResponse model. This is the LEGACY API, not V2.

issues: Shows 'Connecté temps réel' but WebSocket falls back to HTTP polling - cosmetic only, data loads correctly

passed_tests: V2 Temps réel toggle visible and active - SUCCESS
Réception V2 view - 40 rooms displayed with table, filters, KPIs - SUCCESS
Direction V2 view - KPIs (40 rooms, 78% occupancy, 8 départs, 13 recouches), floor plan, 4 active staff - SUCCESS
Gouvernante V2 view - 3 tabs (Validation, Équipe, Stocks) - SUCCESS
Gouvernante V2 - Valider button opens dialog with rating stars and comments - SUCCESS
Gouvernante V2 - Refuser button opens dialog with reason field - SUCCESS
Gouvernante V2 - Équipe tab shows 4 team members with progress - SUCCESS
Gouvernante V2 - Stocks tab shows 6 inventory items with 1 alert - SUCCESS
Mobile Femme de chambre V2 - 21 tasks, timer, Terminer button - SUCCESS
Mobile V2 - Terminer dialog with photo upload and notes - SUCCESS
critical_code_review_comments: All V2 views (ReceptionViewV2, DirectionViewV2, GouvernanteViewV2, MobileHousekeepingViewV2) are properly integrated with NestJS API
Valider/Refuser inspection workflow fully functional with proper status transitions (en_attente -> valide/refuse)
WebSocket connection falls back to HTTP polling gracefully - data loads correctly
Legacy API /api/hotels/{hotelId}/rooms has Pydantic validation error but V2 API works fine
seed_data_creation: NestJS has demo data: 40 rooms, 21 tasks, 9 staff, 3 inspections (1 validated, 1 refused, 1 pending)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Housekeeping V2 module fully tested and working. All 4 views (Réception, Direction, Gouvernante, Mobile) display data correctly from NestJS API. Valider/Refuser inspection buttons work with proper dialogs. The legacy API has a minor issue but V2 API is fully functional.

direction_v2.kpis: 5 KPI cards (40 rooms, 78% occupancy, 8 départs, 13 recouches, 25% propreté)
direction_v2.floor_plan: Room chips by floor with color coding

gouvernante_v2.equipe_tab: 4 team members with assigned rooms and progress
gouvernante_v2.stocks_tab: 6 inventory items with 1 low stock alert
